name: HTS_CONSOL_CHANGE_EVENTS
description: The table is to store one record for each impacted schedule unit, allowing for efficient tracking and processing of events and their impact on schedule units.

columns.Name: CONSOLIDATED_CHANGE_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for each consolidated change event record.

columns.Name: CHANGE_EVENT_SET_ID
columns.Comments: References the change event set this consolidated event change belongs.

columns.Name: CHANGE_EVENT_IDS
columns.Comments:
A comma-separated list of the ids of the change events that are consolidated
into this record.

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the object affected by the consolidated change event.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the object affected by the consolidated change event.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the assignment related to the consolidated change event.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the person related to the consolidated change event.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the schedule unit impacted by the consolidated change event.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: PUBLISH_INSTANT
columns.Comments: Timestamp when the consolidated change event was published.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CHANGES_CONSOLIDATED
columns.Comments: Consolidated attribute changes related to the consolidated change event.

columns.Name: DELETE_EVENT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating whether the consolidated change event denotes a deletion.

columns.Name: NOTIFIABLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating if the consolidated event needs to be considered as origin of notified impacts.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID
